mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM oa_address_book WHERE del_flag = 0
AND (contact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY contact_name
SELECT * FROM oa_address_book WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY contact_name
SELECT * FROM oa_address_group WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort
